plain:
in the 3
it’s getting deep
we been going tribal in the deep end
maybe, I'm just sowing what I'm reaping I've been really feeling like the reaper
Cause I'm playing for my keeps and then I keep them
Turning on the news, I see the reaper Laying in the sheets and never sleeping
Lately, we've been fighting in the deep end Lately, I've been praying for the third world
But it feel like it not reaching I don't know what he think he reaching for
I might lift the heater and delete him Smoking on that shit cause I'm a chief
Smoking on that shit cause I'm a chieftain All my hitters rolling with the leaf, yeah
How I get so cold, my heart is freezing
I know that you gone but I need you to myself I know that you hurt from all the pain that you felt
And when I did you wrong, it make me wanna smoke that pack
I'ma heal the world and I'ma put it on my back When I wanna go deep
I just bought a bezel, now they watching on me I just know my heart is cold, I blame it on me
Pain in our blood, they gonna feel it when we bleed
Free Palestine, said from the river to the sea
I know you heard lately I’m stuck in the slum
forever leave, the past right in the deep end
What you say, what you heard, I cannot speak it
Call it even, don't believe me, gotta believe it
I just wanna take it to the deep end
Running out of time, no time for beefing
Made it out da mud, I had to leave it
Free all my people in Middle Eastern
We been going tribal in the deep end
Maybe I'm just sowing what I'm reaping
I've been really feeling like the reaper
Cause I'm playing for my keeps and then I keep them
Deep end, deep end, I'm finna leap in
Deep end, running off a deep end
Goalie but I'm not your keeper
Lately, still it’s getting deeper
Pain in my back, I felt that shit, straight from the jump
I know you heard lately I’m stuck in the slums
Forever lift, my people out of deep end
Call it even, don't believe me, gotta believe it
We been going tribal in the deep end
Maybe I'm just sowing what I'm reaping
I've been really feeling like the reaper
Cause I'm playing for my keeps and then I keep it
Turning on the news to see the reaper
Laying in the sheets and never sleeping
Lately, we been fighting in the deep end
Lately, I've been praying for the 3
